description: Plan-mode review gate: PreToolUse blocks ExitPlanMode unless review-plan has produced a slug-scoped gate file at ~/.claude/plans/.review-ready-<slug>, or a prior successful exit left an `.exited-<slug>` sentinel (idempotent re-exit allowed silently). PostToolUse renames the gate to the sentinel and emits an advisory nudge to invoke /schedule-plan-tasks.
